deeperExplanation: C++ Core Principles Part 10A becomes more powerful when combined with other C++ concepts. In production, it interacts with error handling, validation, and optimization.
mutabilityExplained: Consider whether your data structures should be mutable or immutable when implementing this pattern.
noneValue: Always check for null/None/undefined values — this is the most common source of runtime errors.
internalImplementation: The cpp runtime handles this efficiently behind the scenes.

examples.title: Getting Started with C++ Core Principles Part 10A
examples.explanation: Basic introduction to C++ Core Principles Part 10A.

debuggingWalkthrough.scenario: A c++ core principles part 10a implementation behaves unexpectedly.

performanceNotes.notes: Performance varies by implementation. Profile to find bottlenecks.
